programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.title: Jingle All The Way
programme.desc: After promising his young son that Santa will get him the number one item on the boy's wish list, a well-meaning workaholic father's Christmas Eve turns into a hilariously nightmarish, madcap scramble across the city to find the much sought-after and therefore virtually impossible-to-find toy.

programme.title: Thomas Kinkade's Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: Barely out of school and still searching for his voice as an artist, twenty-year-old Thom looks forward to another idyllic holiday in his hometown of Placerville, CA, a rustic hamlet nestled in the Sierra foothills. But this Christmas, Placerville is struggling: the town's tourist industry is failing, Thom's ailing, once-brilliant mentor, Glen, has lost his ability to paint, and Thom's spirited mother, MaryAnne, reveals that she's losing their family home to foreclosure. Faced with so much uncertainty, Thom comes to realize that salvation may lie in the community of friends and loved ones he left behind. With Glen's help, he not only discovers himself as an artist, but helps the entire town of Placerville rediscover the true spirit of the holidays.

programme.desc: Grace Manning is in over her head as CEO of Marathon Toys and her wild-child ways are causing the company's stock to plummet. Grace's old Eve doll magically awakes to help get Grace back on track.

programme.title: Jingle All The Way
programme.desc: After promising his young son that Santa will get him the number one item on the boy's wish list, a well-meaning workaholic father's Christmas Eve turns into a hilariously nightmarish, madcap scramble across the city to find the much sought-after and therefore virtually impossible-to-find toy.

programme.title: The Legend of Zorro (2005)
programme.desc: A threat to California's pending statehood causes Alejandro de la Vega to take action.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: A young squire embarks on a quest to change his stars, win the heart of an exceedingly fair maiden, and rock his medieval world.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: When four talented magicians join forces, they mesmerize an international audience with a series of daring heists that has the law scrambling to anticipate their next big crime.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen return for a second mind-bending adventure, elevating the limits of stage illusion to new heights with unprecedented stunts and their most impossible heist yet.

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his sister and her young daughter.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: As they're held for ransom, a husband (Nicolas Cage) and wife's (Nicole Kidman) predicament grows more dire amid the discovery of betrayal and deception.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: A young squire embarks on a quest to change his stars, win the heart of an exceedingly fair maiden, and rock his medieval world.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: When four talented magicians join forces, they mesmerize an international audience with a series of daring heists that has the law scrambling to anticipate their next big crime.

programme.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
programme.desc: Inspired by true events: when a little girl's lemonade stand gets shut down over an outdated bylaw, Trish, a PR rep with the nation's largest lemonade chain, returns to her hometown to fight the ban. She discovers the girl's father is none other than the high school sweetheart she left behind.

programme.title: Stars Fell On Alabama
programme.desc: An actress pretends to be a Hollywood agent's girlfriend to impress his friends at his 15-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Stars Fell Again
programme.desc: Sequel to Stars Fell on Alabama. Bryce is ready to propose to Madison while they visit her family for Christmas. However, the spontaneous wedding of Madison's sister, Harper, throws Bryce's perfect proposal plans into a tailspin.

programme.title: What a Girl Wants
programme.desc: Daphne (Amanda Bynes), a spirited young American girl, travels to London in search of her long-lost father (Colin Firth), an influential aristoc ratic politician.

programme.title: Merry Matrimony
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Brie has to work with her ex to organize the perfect Christmas photo shoot.

programme.title: Return to Christmas Creek
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Amelia returns to Christmas Creek to rediscover family at Christmas.

programme.title: Our Italian Christmas Memories
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The Colucci siblings set out to recreate their grandmother's pasta sauce.

programme.title: Our Christmas Journey
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. At Christmas, Lena finds a new path for her autistic son and bonds with her ex.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. A divorced mom wants her two kids' first Christmas without dad to be perfect.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: Jenna is a fashion designer who is mistaken for a famous influencer.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant on one condition.

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Rebecca is an incredibly successful image "upgrader."

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: Jenna is a fashion designer who is mistaken for a famous influencer.

programme.title: Divergent
programme.desc: Tris Prior (Shailene Woodley) lives in a futuristic world in which society is divided into five factions. As each person enters adulthood, he or she must choose a faction and commit to it for life. Tris chooses Dauntless -- those who pursue bravery above all else. However, her initiation leads to the discovery that she is a Divergent and will never be able to fit into just one faction. Warned that she must conceal her status, Tris uncovers a looming war which threatens everyone she loves.

programme.title: The Divergent Series
programme.desc: Now on the run from Jeanine (Kate Winslet) and the rest of the power-hungry Erudites, Tris (Shailene Woodley) and Four (Theo James) search for allies and answers in the ruins of Chicago. They must find out what Tris' family sacrificed their lives to protect and why the Erudites will do anything to stop them. Side by side, Tris and Four face one seemingly insurmountable challenge after another, as they unravel the secrets of the past and -- ultimately -- the future of their world.

programme.title: The Divergent Series
programme.desc: Tris (Shailene Woodley) escapes with Four (Theo James) to journey beyond the wall that encloses Chicago. For the first time, they leave the only city and family they have ever known to find a peaceful solution. Once outside, they learn shocking new truths that render old discoveries meaningless. As the ruthless battle threatens humanity, Tris and Four quickly decide who to trust to survive. Tris must ultimately make difficult choices about courage, allegiance, sacrifice and love.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay comes the best 'Transformers' ever! With humanity facing extinction from a terrifying new threat, it's up to the Autobots to save Earth. They'll need new allies, including inventor Cade (Mark Wahlberg) and the Dinobots!

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: A comet is hurtling toward Earth and could mean the end of all human life. The U.S. government keeps the crisis under wraps, but crack reporter Jenny Lerner (Tea Leoni) uncovers the truth -- forcing U.S. President Beck (Morgan Freeman) to announce his plan. Grizzled astronaut Spurgeon "Fish" Tanner (Robert Duvall) and his team will land on the comet and lay explosives, hopefully deterring the object from its doomsday course. If not, humanity will have to prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: One morning in an ordinary town, five people are shot dead in a seemingly random attack all evidence points to a single suspect: an ex-military sniper who is quickly brought into custody Reacher, an enigmatic ex-Army investigator, believes the authorities have the right man but agrees to help the sniper's defense attorney.. However, the more Reacher delves into the case, the less clear-cut it appears.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran and drifter John J. Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) wanders into a small Washington town in search of an old friend, but is met with intolerance and brutality by the local sheriff, Will Teasle (Brian Dennehy). When Teasle and his deputies restrain and shave Rambo, he flashes back to his time as a prisoner of war and unleashes his fury on the officers. He narrowly escapes the manhunt, but it will take his former commander (Richard Crenna) to save the hunters from the hunted.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) is doing hard time in jail when his former boss, Col. Troutman (Richard Crenna), offers him a deal. If Rambo travels to Vietnam to try to find the American prisoners of war, his criminal record will be expunged. Rambo takes the reconnaissance assignment and agrees not to get involved in any of the action. However, when his Vietnamese lover, Co Bao (Julia Nickson), is killed by American forces, Rambo forgets his promise and takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi helps a recenly orphaned high-school girl train in karate and come to terms with her grief.

programme.title: Short Circuit
programme.desc: A military robot, struck by lightning, gains awarness, prompting it to escape to learn more about the world.

programme.title: Short Circuit 2
programme.desc: Number Five, A.K.A. Johnny Five, that incredible lovable robot, is back and taking the big city by storm.

programme.title: Striking Distance
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars as a maverick cop tracking down a serial killer with the help of a new partner.

programme.title: Divorce American Style
programme.desc: Suburban couple Richard Harmon (Dick Van Dyke) and his wife, Barbara (Debbie Reynolds), have exhausted their patience in their marriage. Bored and no closer to fixing their problems through counseling, the couple opts to divorce, and the proceeding tug-of-war over children, money and possessions reveals that maintaining their marriage was far easier than ending it. Along the way are attempts for both at new relationships, with the subject of alimony playing a hidden role in matters.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: In 1943, a small commando team is sent to destroy huge German guns on the Greek Island of Navarone in order to rescue Allied troops trapped on Kheros. Led by British Major Franklin (Anthony Quayle), the team includes American Mallory (Gregory Peck), Greek resistance fighter Stavros (Anthony Quinn) and reluctant explosives expert Miller. Facing impossible odds, the men battle stormy seas and daunting cliffs. When Franklin is injured, Mallory takes command, and personal enmities spill over.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
programme.desc: When the idealistic young Jefferson Smith (James Stewart) winds up appointed to the United States Senate, he gains the mentorship of Senator Joseph Paine (Claude Rains). However, Paine isn't as noble as his reputation would indicate, and he becomes involved in a scheme to discredit Smith, who wants to build a boys' campsite where a more lucrative project could go. Determined to stand up against Paine and his corrupt peers, Smith takes his case to the Senate floor.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Two thrill-seeking adventurers cross paths with a beautiful doctor and they find themselves on the ultimate hunt for a treasure that claims all who seek it.

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: In this “edge of your seat thriller,”* John Travolta stars as Frank Morrison, a man who discovers that his son's new stepfather (Vince Vaughn) is not who he pretends to be.

programme.title: The Time Machine
programme.desc: Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th-century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds humankind divided into two warring races.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Stealing Christmas
programme.desc: A burglar (Tony Danza) lands a job playing Santa Claus as he plots to rob a small-town bank on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Must Be Santa
programme.desc: An angel (Deanna Milligan) must convince a new recruit (Arnold Pinnock) that he should be Santa, to the dismay of her boss, the North Pole's CEO (Dabney Coleman).

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Following their high-school graduation, Jade Butterfield (Gabriella Wilde), a sheltered but privileged teen, becomes enthralled with David Elliot (Alex Pettyfer), a working-class youth with a troubled past. Though Jade and David quickly fall in love, Jade's father (Bruce Greenwood) strongly disapproves of the relationship, while David's father (Robert Patrick) advises caution. However, their parents' disapproval only makes the love-struck teens more determined to pursue the intense affair.

programme.title: Cry Baby
programme.desc: A prim and proper schoolgirl goes against her mother's wishes when she dates a motorcycle-riding juvenile delinquent.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Helen is banned from a store when she is accused of shoplifting.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.desc: Gerald tries to inspire his children by adopting a highway, but ends up in a turf war.

programme.title: The Goode Family
programme.sub-title: A Goode Man Is Hard to Find
programme.desc: Gerald thinks Mo and Trish want him to be the sperm donor for their next child Charlie decides to teach Ubuntu how to be a man.

programme.title: A Monster in Paris
programme.desc: Raoul and Emile accidentally release a monster from an eccentric scientist's greenhouse and vow to track it down. They soon realize the beast may not be as menacing as it appears and try to save it from a corrupt police chief.

programme.title: FernGully ... the Last Rainforest
programme.desc: Crysta (Samantha Mathis) is a fairy who lives in FernGully, a rainforest in Australia, and has never seen a human before. In fact, she is told they are extinct. But when a logging company comes near the rainforest, she sees that they do exist, and even accidentally shrinks one of them: a boy named Zak (Jonathan Ward). Now her size, Zak sees the damage that the company does and helps Crysta to stop not only them, but an evil entity named Hexxus (Tim Curry), who feeds off pollution.

programme.title: Judy Moody and the NOT Bummer Summer
programme.desc: Judy (Jordana Beatty) has planned the most awesome summer ever and can't wait to have adventures with her best friends, Rocky and Amy. Then she finds out that Rocky is off to tame lions and that Amy is flying to Borneo with her mother to save a lost tribe. Judy is bummed to be left home with her rotten brother, Stink (Parris Mosteller), and her second-best friend, Frank Pearl. And, what's worse, her parents go to California and leave her with an aunt (Heather Graham) she's never even met.

programme.title: Jack and the Cuckoo-Clock Heart
programme.desc: A man (Orlando Seale) with a timepiece for a heart ignores warnings that he must never fall in love after he spies a beautiful singer (Samantha Barks).

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: The Wedding Chapel
programme.desc: Uninspired and newly single, painter Sara is down on her luck and wants nothing more than to get away.

programme.desc: Firefighter Jenny has fallen in love with Tom. However his ex-wife Mary demands a reconciliation if he wants to see his daughter at Christmas.

programme.title: Perfect Game (Dubbed)
programme.desc: Two friends who threw their dreams at a world. CHOI Dong-won and SUN Dong-yeol's solitary yet intense matchup!

programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Cart

programme.title: Glitter and Grime

programme.desc: A British scount is sent to infiltrate a French stronghold and learn their plans for the Great Lakes

programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger (Sam Elliott) befriends and protects a settler (Tom Conti) and his wife (Kate Capshaw) in 1876 Wyoming.

programme.title: The Sacketts

programme.title: The Sacketts

programme.desc: John Ford's landmark Western revolves around an assorted group of colorful passengers aboard the Overland stagecoach bound for Lordsburg, New Mexico, in the 1880s. programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.desc: A man names his gold vein discovery after his wife.

programme.desc: A missionary puts himself on the line to mediate a conflict between settlers and Navajo.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The Dalton brothers try a double bank robbery.

programme.sub-title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
programme.desc: A large, mysterious creature attacks settlers.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A mule skinner risks his animals to save a town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An Indian boy proves his love for a depot manager.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Pauline runs a saloon in Casa Grande and has shown she neither needs or wants a husband when Jere Fryer arrives in town, he wagers he will marry her in a week.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: William Randolph Hearst, a San Francisco newspaperman with big plans for his struggling paper, must find a way to make his business profitable.

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Part I

programme.title: Part II
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Little Joe spend a most unforgettable night at the carnival when Little Joe's date disappears.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A sheriff's daughter runs off with her boyfriend (John Ericson), unaware he is a murderous bank robber.

programme.desc: After Anne Bailey's husband is killed by Native Americans, she defies the social norms of the frontier and becomes a horseback courier, risking her life to race through hostile territory delivering vital supplies to isolated forts and settlements.

programme.sub-title: Al Jennings and the Legend of Dick West

programme.desc: Cheyenne meets a blind singer named Constance Mason and her maid, Cleo.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is forced to give refuge to a young bank robber.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gives a once-famous marshal a chance for rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Corner
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: A gang is poaching game out of season Roy discovers the meat and fights to put an end to their ways.

programme.title: My Pal Trigger

programme.title: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Macklin (Alec Baldwin), a hit man with a passion for rare jazz records, accepts what he thinks is a routine job. The hit turns out to be a setup, though, because Pointy (Michael Jai White), an up-and-coming gangster, wants Macklin out of the way. When Macklin realizes who's behind the setup, the two criminals enter into an increasingly deadly cat-and-mouse game. Before long, the feud expands to include tough female cop Petrone (Rebecca De Mornay) and top Mafia bosses.

programme.title: Brooklyn's Finest
programme.desc: A massive drug operation changes the lives of three conflicted New York cops. Burned-out vet Eddie Dugan (Richard Gere) is close to retirement narcotics cop Sal Procida (Ethan Hawke) faces the difficult task of caring for his large family on his ordinary salary undercover officer Clarence "Tango" Butler (Don Cheadle) finds his loyalties beginning to shift toward a powerful drug dealer. Over seven chaotic days, the three men are drawn toward a fateful crime and destiny.

programme.title: Traffik
programme.desc: Brea and John embark on a romantic weekend getaway to an isolated estate in the mountains. They are pleasantly surprised when two of their friends, Darren and Malia, also show up unexpectedly. Their plans for fun soon give way to terror when members of a violent biker gang invade the peaceful countryside. Banded together, they now find themselves in a fight for their lives as their assailants will stop at nothing to protect their secrets from the outside world.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: Greed and betrayal ensnares three people (Danny Glover, Steve Zahn, Leelee Sobieski) when they find a stash of diamonds aboard a train.

programme.title: Las Vegas

programme.desc: After their mom abandons them, teen Bethany struggles to pay bills and save her dying sister, Bailey. Discovering a talent for repairing old phones, she pitches a unique business to a tech CEO, overcoming obstacles to save her sister and build a new life.

programme.title: Scrawny Teen Becomes Popular
programme.desc: Benji, a bullied teen, learns martial arts for self-defense. He uses his skills in an underground fight club for money, but guided by his master's wisdom, he chooses to fight for justice, helping his mom and a neighbor escape abusive situations.

programme.title: Orphan Kid Becomes Karate Master
programme.desc: Bullied orphan Fletcher, inspired by Jackie Chan, learns martial arts from a kind dojo owner, Daniel. When his estranged biological father, a powerful politician, reappears seeking an endorsement, Fletcher exposes his past, saving Daniel's dojo and launching his own career.

programme.title: Girl Fakes Ugly For Views
programme.desc: Narcissistic James dates beauty influencer Kyla, who secretly battles insecurity. After James publicly humiliates her, Kyla uses special effects makeup to go undercover and find genuine love, leading to a surprising twist.

programme.title: Deaf Girl Told She Can't Sing
programme.desc: Mia, a vocal major, is diagnosed with a rare condition causing progressive hearing loss. Devastated, she leaves music, but her mom helps her find a new way to "feel" music. Mia auditions for AGT, captivating audiences, and earns a record deal.

programme.title: Girl Has Imaginary Online Boyfriend
programme.desc: Lana, seeking her ideal partner, dismisses her best friend John, unaware he's the anonymous blogger she adores. After pursuing the wrong guy, Lana discovers John's secret, realizing his true worth and regretting her superficial pursuit of love.

programme.title: Girl's Debt Magically Paid Off
programme.desc: Jenny, blaming bad luck for her misfortunes, is conned by her best friend, Savannah, pretending to be a fortune teller. Jenny's "curse" is lifted, motivating her to work hard and turn her life around, ultimately realizing her destiny is her own choice.

programme.title: Popular Girl Has Secret Crush On Nerd
programme.desc: Bentley, a high school heartbreaker, makes a bet to win over Rose, enlisting her friend Reggie's help. Reggie's growing feelings for Rose and Bentley's deceit lead to a prom-night confrontation, exposing truths and revealing true connections.

programme.title: Teen Regrets Teasing Rich Kid
programme.desc: A wealthy but lonely teen, Garrett, attempts suicide, feeling unloved. Saved by an unlikely trio—a homeless man, a poor classmate, and a school bully—he realizes his profound impact on their lives and finds the belonging he craved.

programme.title: House Sitter Destroys Home
programme.desc: Kristen plans a house party while house-sitting to fund her Mexico trip. Her scheme unravels as the house gets trashed, the dog goes missing, and the owners return to discover the chaos. Despite a last-minute miracle, Kristen's dishonesty ultimately costs her the trip.

programme.title: Peer Pressure Pushes Teen Too Far
programme.desc: Desperate for money, Nate turns to drug dealing, enjoying a lavish lifestyle. But after being robbed, he realizes the dangers and accepts help from his best friend, choosing an honest path over quick cash.

programme.title: Poor Boy Has No Lunch Money
programme.desc: An orphaned boy, Joey, endures abuse by his foster mom but finds solace in school. When his teacher, Mrs. Stevens, discovers his plight, she rescues him, and he flourishes as the lead in the school play.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.3
programme.desc: Perry Park rushes to the scene despite warnings when he hears that a woman has been kidnapped by bikers. Ri Jin closely observes Do Hyun's completely changed demeanor. Do Hyun later attends the Seung Jin Group board meeting and is officially appointed vice president, but Tae Im slaps him in anger for being late.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.4
programme.desc: A new personality appears in Do Hyun — this time, that of a young child — leaving him shocked. Meanwhile, Se Gi drags Ri Jin off to somewhere unknown.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.5
programme.desc: Se Gi, who has kidnapped Ri Jin, asks her to make Do Hyun disappear forever. Director Ahn begins tracking their whereabouts. Meanwhile, Do Hyun ends up at Ri On's house, and Ri On introduces him to his family as “Mr. Perry.”

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.6
programme.desc: Do Hyun can't stop thinking about Ri Jin, which only fuels Se Gi's jealousy. Eventually, Se Gi warns him, “If you touch my woman, yours will be in danger.” Provoked, Do Hyun goes to Ri Jin and asks her to become his secret personal doctor.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.7
programme.desc: Tae Im questions Director Ahn about the reason for Do Hyun's return to Korea, leaving him flustered. Ri Jin struggles to stop Yo Seob from taking his own life. Hwa Ran orders someone to find Min Seo Yeon's long-lost child, while Do Hyun begins strategizing to meet the mysterious writer Omega.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.8
programme.desc: Gi Joon proposes to Chae Yeon, but she gets angry at his attitude. Ri Jin agrees to be Do Hyun's secret doctor, but is shocked to learn she has to live in the same house as him. Thus begins their uneasy and awkward cohabitation.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.4
programme.desc: Jo Gwan Woong visits the Hundred Year Inn. Tae Seo politely informs him there are no empty rooms, but Gwan Woong becomes enraged and causes a scene. Kang Chi, who had been kicked out by Lady Yoon, hears the news and, after some conflict, returns to confront Jo Gwan Woong.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.5
programme.desc: Kang Chi and Yeo Wool are attacked by dark shadows. Kang Chi, unfamiliar with such opponents, is cut multiple times while fighting back. Hearing Kang Chi is injured, Chung Jo visits him out of worry, and they share an affectionate hug. Yeo Wool witnesses their embrace.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.6
programme.desc: Enraged by Jo Gwan Woong's atrocities, Kang Chi's eyes turn red, and he lunges at him. Jo Gwan Woong frames Park Mu Sol for high treason and Kang Chi for murder.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.7
programme.desc: Yeo Wool is deeply shocked to see Kang Chi transform into a half-human, half-beast before her eyes and reports it to Dam Pyung Joon. Kang Chi, unable to accept his hidden beastly nature, is tormented.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.8
programme.desc: Jo Gwan Woong, having framed Kang Chi for murder, orders his execution. At that moment, Yi Sun Shin appears, demands Kang Chi's release, and declares the punishment unjust.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.9
programme.desc: Dam Pyung Joon accepts Kang Chi and Tae Seo into the Mu Hyung Do Gwan (martial arts school), and Kang Chi strives to become a formal disciple. Jo Gwan Woong, suspicious of the Hundred Year Inn's asset list, searches for a secret vault. Meanwhile, Yi Sun Shin and Dam Pyung Joon plot to retrieve 5,000 nyang of silver without Gwan Woong's knowledge.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.10
programme.desc: Kang Chi and Yeo Wool are trapped in the room where the silver chest is hidden. Seo-bwagwan grows suspicious of the wall hidden behind a scroll. Meanwhile, seeing Yeo Wool's scar, Kang Chi remembers his childhood encounter with her.

programme.title: Good Manager Ep.6
programme.desc: TQ Group takes Mr. Kim in thinking that he is the leader of the Labor Union and makes a deal with him to immediately stop the protest. Mr. Kim has to decide whether he will accept the deal or not. Mr. Kim is also approached by the police for document forgery and they say it's real this time.

programme.title: Good Manager Ep.7
programme.desc: Hagyeong and Yooseon help Mr. Kim out of his charges, and Yul gets someone to find out who got him out. Meanwhile, Mr. Kim is sent to the waiting room for ruining the company reputation.

programme.title: Good Manager Ep.8
programme.desc: Mr. Kim's fight against TQ in the waiting room is finally put to end. Although he is back with the team, he finds out Hagyeong has been up to and decides to leave the company. As he was leaving the company he receives a text message from Yooseon and barges into the meeting saying that he has something to say.

programme.title: Good Manager Ep.9
programme.desc: Yooseon appoints Mr. Kim and the Business Operations Department as the team to come up with a revival plan for TQ Delivery. Mr. Kim and the team gets to work in coming up with an appropriate plan. Meanwhile, Yul warns the Business Operations Department that they will be dissolved if the plan they come up with does not meet the expectations.

programme.title: Good Manager Ep.10
programme.desc: The Business Operations Department is hesitant to start working on the revival plan project since the team will get dissolved if it doesn't turn out well. In order to stop that from happening, Mr. Kim and Hagyeong gets hard at work and try their best to reveal the corruptions.

programme.title: Good Manager Ep.11
programme.desc: Yul dissolves Business Operations Department, and this puts Mr. Kim down. However, his depression doesn't last long and he's once again back to his old self again. Now it's time for him to get back at Yul.

programme.title: Good Manager Ep.12
programme.desc: Winning against the battle with Chariman Park, Mr. Kim successfully brings back Business Operations back in one. He also shares the money he received from Yooseon with his co-workers without them knowing that it was him who shared the money. Despite this victory, Mr. Kim still feels uneasy and at the end, he finally realizes what's been bothering him.

programme.desc: I Didn't Do It is a one hour special that follows a murder investigation in Austin Texas gone terribly wrong. When 20 year old Nancy DePriest is murdered while working alone, two unlikely suspects, Chris Ochoa and Richard Danziger, are questioned and quickly charged with the crime. It seemed like a simple case. In fact, these young men were completely innocent and the killer remained at large. In this fascinating and riveting narrative, their nightmarish ordeal ended only after the intervention of a tenacious young homicide detective in Austin and a confession by the real killer.

programme.title: Dunedin, St. Peter-Clearwater
programme.desc: In this season opener, the hosts explore Dunedin Golf Club, a beautifully restored Donald Ross-designed course in Florida. Off the course, the episode dives into local activities like paddleboarding, beach running, and fishing, emphasizing the unique artsy vibe of St. Pete versus the lively, event-filled atmosphere of Clearwater. programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads deep into Montana's rugged mountains to hunt black bears, reflecting on two decades of memories in this harsh yet captivating landscape. Joined by memories of his brother and their youthful adventures, Steve navigates grizzly country, contemplates the passage of time, and explores the evolving nature of hunting. Through encounters with both bears and the terrain, Steve seeks not just game but a connection to the past and the lessons it holds.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Nevada Mule Deer with Joe Rogan
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with Joe Rogan in Nevada's high desert to bowhunt for elusive mule deer bucks. Surrounded by vast public lands and rugged terrain, they navigate the challenges of close-range stalking with their bows. With Joe's enthusiasm for archery and Steve's experience, the duo pushes their limits in pursuit of these wary deer, embracing the highs and lows of hunting in one of America's most unforgiving landscapes.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Prince Of Wales: Fishing and Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads back to his fish shack on Prince of Wales Island in Southeast Alaska, this time with friend and colleague Morgan Fallon. Known for his cinematography, Mo now wants to switch roles from behind the camera to filling his freezer. Together, they embark on a classic Alaskan adventure: fishing for rockfish, setting shrimp pots, and hunting Sitka blacktail deer, all while reminiscing about past trips and discovering new ways the wilderness shapes them.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and his friend Ronny Boehme head to the vast sagebrush seas of Southeast Wyoming to hunt America's largest game bird, the sage grouse. Known for their size and elusive nature, these birds offer a challenging hunt across open country. Joined by local experts, they explore the complexities of sage grouse conservation and hunting, testing their patience and skills in pursuit of these storied birds.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Late October in Southeast Alaska finds Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman chasing Sitka blacktail deer. As the bucks begin their descent from the alpine into dense timber, the trio faces the challenge of hunting in the thick, damp rainforest. While navigating through muskeg patches and testing their luck with calling techniques, they must contend with unpredictable weather and tough terrain. When deer prove elusive, they turn to fishing and foraging.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Midway through a challenging hunt on Prince of Wales Island, Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman are searching for Sitka blacktail deer. The rut hasn't kicked in as expected, leaving the hunters frustrated and the deer elusive. Adapting their strategies, they decide to split up and quietly stalk through dense woods and muskeg. After days of patience and perseverance, a mix of skill, luck, and determination finally leads them closer to success.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Remi And Steve, Elk Hunting Again
programme.desc: In the bitter cold of Montana's Bitterroot Mountains, Steve teams up with Remi Warren for the closing days of the general elk season. Facing steep hills and frigid winds, they navigate public lands where competition is fierce, and success is hard-won. As they track elk across challenging terrain, Remi and Steve split up to increase their chances. A tense and calculated hunt unfolds, leading to a final showdown with two elusive bulls.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Guyana's jungle, Steve teams up with Macushi guides Roven and Dennis to explore the wild Riwa River. They fish for piranhas and massive catfish, employing traditional methods passed down through generations. As they camp along the river, the crew learns the intricate skills of the Macushi, from crafting bows and arrows using natural materials to preparing their catch over a slow-burning fire. The journey is a raw adventure into survival, skill, and pragmatism.

programme.title: MeatEater

programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Waterfowl Hunting In Argentina, Is This A Dream!?-| The Journey Within, South America Waterfowl Slam
programme.desc: It's May of 2022 and Mark Peterson is waterfowl hunting in Argentina. A year has passed since Mark conquered the North America Waterfowl Slam. During the off-season, and with Covid just a memory, his focus shifted to thoughts of South America and the waterfowl species that it holds. After a few months of research and talking with the experts at Worldwide Trophy Adventures, he laid out the plan to attempt the South America slam in 2022. With 20 species on the list, Mark is now hunting ducks below the equator as they migrate North to warmer weather. Enjoy this first installment of a 9 episode series that showcases his new quest for another single-season waterfowl slam.

programme.title: Without a Paddle

The campsite, however, has special significance. Billy believed famous airplane hijacker D.B. Cooper hid money in the area, and his friends aim to find it. Unfortunately, they are not prepared for the adventure. After falling over a waterfall, they are left to the mercy of wild animals and a harsh wilderness terrain.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy

Soon he grows jealous, begins a bitter feud with Veronica and eventually makes a vulgar slip on live TV that ruins his career. However, when an outrageous story breaks at the San Diego Zoo, Ron may get a chance to redeem himself.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: In an ensemble film about easy money, greed, manipulation and bad driving, a Las Vegas casino tycoon entertains his wealthiest high rollers -- a group that will bet on anything -- by pitting six ordinary people against each other in a wild dash for $2 million jammed into a locker hundreds of miles away. The tycoon and his wealthy friends monitor each racer's every move to keep track of their favorites. The only rule in this race is that there are no rules.

programme.title: Scott Losse
programme.desc: Scott Losse is a stand-up comedian from Seattle, Washington. He is married and has two chihuahuas. Scott has performed at Portland's Bridgetown Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, Sketchfest Seattle, Bumbershoot: Seattle's Music & Arts Festival, Treefort Music Fest and lots of places that aren't festivals. Comedy Clubs. Colleges. Bars. Elks Lodges. He was the winner of the 2013 Northwest Comedy Competition and a Semi-Finalist in the Seattle International Comedy Competition. Scott can be seen on the latest season of Laughs TV on FOX.

programme.title: Tom Ryan
programme.desc: Over the years Tom Ryan has worked steadily at comedy clubs, concert venues, corporate functions and colleges across the U.S.. He has also made national television appearances on Showtime, A&E Comedy Central, and… Three times on “The Late Show with David Letterman!”. He has performed as the opening act in concert for: B.B. King, Tim Allen, Steven Wright, Natalie Cole, and Dennis Miller just to name a few. He has contributed monologue jokes to the award winning "Politically Incorrect with Bill Maher" and regularly headlines corporate events for companies ranging from Coca-Cola to Church and Dwight. Tom believes that the best comedy comes from the most unlikely sources.

programme.title: Rob Brackenridge
programme.desc: Wisconsin native Rob Brackenridge offers sharp observations of his hometown with riffs on accents, beef snacks, and black ice.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Gaffney has appeared on The Artie Lange Show, he was on the first and third seasons of Gotham Comedy Live and was a semi-finalist on season 8 of Last Comic Standing.

programme.title: Larry Omaha
programme.sub-title: Freaky Times in a Freaky World
programme.desc: Omaha's insightful view on multi-ethnic America has garnered him numerous tv appearances and places him in great demand. His stories are hailed by the Los Angeles Times as "Refreshing , funny and universal." His side-splitting jabs at the hypocrisy of Am

programme.title: Landry: Hair Chronicles
programme.desc: Landry's energy is contagious. Coming to the Dry Bar stage with a fresh, bold take on common tropes, he describes the difference between first-class passengers and everyone else a DUI and an IUD and Cracker Barrel versus any yard sale.

programme.title: Andrew Hobbs
programme.desc: Have you ever, as an adult, been bullied by a healthcare professional or popular middle school girl? Andrew has. The comedy of Andrew Hobbs encapsulates the bizarre awkwardness of belated maturity and his attempts to appear in control. Andrew will have you rolling with laughter as he twists a narrative of humor and heart from his own life experiences and observations. His comedy has been featured in comedy festivals across the country. He has been perfecting his craft since childhood and throughout adulthood.

programme.title: Corey Rodrigues
programme.desc: Corey is a highly sought after national touring college, club and corporate and cruise ship performer. He was the winner of The Catch a New Rising Star, The Funniest Comic in New England and the 2017 Big Sky Comedy Festivals. Rodrigues has been featured on the hilarious Gotham Live, Laughs on Fox and True Tv's Laff Mobbs Laff Tracks television shows and currently can be heard on Sirius XM. He combines comedy from his own life and the lives of those around him. Mix that with a hilarious point of view and he's able to talk about just about anything.

programme.title: Costaki Economopoulos
programme.desc: For 20 years Costaki has been living his dream as a full-time stand up comic. He has written jokes for Bette Midler, Jay Leno, MTV, and BET. You may have seen him on Showtime or heard him on Sirius, but you probably know him best from his regular appearances on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Radio Show.

programme.title: Karen Rontowski
programme.desc: Karen Rontowski's fast-paced, quirky and charmingly optimistic comedy has been featured in clubs, TV, radio, and at corporate events all around the world. Her stand- up showcases endearing, self-effacing and intelligent characters that catch you by surprise every time. Karen uniquely blends comedy with her experience as a Paranormal Investigator and Reiki master. From fun with her family to her travels all over this great country Karen has fun where ever she goes. Her lighthearted confusion entertains kids of all ages. She is fascinated with the “afterlife” is convinced she will someday have a near death experience because, “I never finish anything.” She explains, “Sometimes a ghost will just do the same thing over and over in life. That's why I want to move into a house that is haunted by a maid." Karen's comedy is now featured in the new line of greeting cards called “Frank and Funny” sold at Target stores everywhere and is the comedy writer for “Haunted Magazine.” She is a regular on the Bob and Tom Radio Show and is a featured performer on their CD. Karen has appeared on The Late Show with David Letterman, Sirius Satellite Radio, Comics Unleashed, Comedy.com, Live at Gotham and Comedy Central. She has opened for show biz legends including Bob Hope, Ray Charles, David Brenner and the Monkees.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.sub-title: Come on down!" "The Price Is Right
programme.desc: - hosted by Bob Barker until 2007 -- features a wide variety of games and contests with the same basic challenge: Guess the prices of everyday (or not-quite-everyday) retail items. Four contestants, all of whom are seated in one of the wildest audiences in daytime game-show history, are called to the stage to play a preliminary pricing round. That winner joins the host on stage for one of more than 70 different pricing games. After three such games, the contestants spin a big wheel -- hoping to get as close to $1 as possible -- in the "Showcase Showdown." That's repeated in the second half of the show, and two highest winners of that round advance to the final, where prizes could be cars or roomsful of furniture. Models present the prizes.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: A rebellious teenager, future Beatle John Lennon (Aaron Johnson) lives with his Aunt Mimi (Kristin Scott Thomas) in working-class Liverpool, England. Mimi's husband suddenly dies, and John spies his mother, Julia (Anne-Marie Duff), at the funeral. Despite Mimi's misgivings, John intends to have a real relationship with his mother. Julia introduces him to popular music and the banjo and, though a family conflict looms, young Lennon is inspired to form his own band.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: When he was a youth in the Queensborough projects, Jonathan White (Channing Tatum) -- then known as Milk -- killed a couple of junkies. His dead father's former partner, Detective Stanford (Al Pacino), got him off the hook for the crime. Now a rookie police officer himself, Jonathan remains haunted by the incident. When a Queens reporter (Juliette Binoche) receives anonymous tips regarding the long-ago crime, the implications for both White and Stanford are clear.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: When rival crook Johnny Amato (Vincent Curatola) hatches a plan to rob a card game run by mob lackey Markie (Ray Liotta), he picks a low-rent thug named Frankie (Scoot McNairy) to do the job. Frankie picks a less-than-ideal partner (Ben Mendelsohn) to help him, but despite their combined incompetence, they manage to make off with the mob's money. In retaliation, Markie's bosses hire Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), a mob enforcer, to eradicate those responsible.

programme.title: Basic Instinct 2
programme.desc: After a crash that kills her boyfriend, Catherine Tramell (Sharon Stone) has her car searched by the police, who find illegal drugs. Prosecutors handling her case send Tramell to see psychiatrist Michael Glass (David Morrissey). Glass determines that Tramell, a novelist whose books deal with sensational murders, might just be a dangerous person herself. But his findings don't prevent him from embarking on a sexually charged relationship with the cunning cougar.

programme.title: Georgia Rule

After Rachel crashes a car, Lilly decides to haul the girl off to a place to which she vowed never to return: Her own mother's (Jane Fonda) Idaho home. Georgia, the family matriarch, lives by a strict code and expects all under her roof to do the same. Given structure and purpose, Rachel's anger at the world begins to subside.

programme.title: Silent Hill
programme.desc: Based on the best-selling horror action game, Silent Hill stars Radha Mitchell (Man on Fire) as Rose, a desperate mother who takes her adopted daughter, Sharon, to the town of Silent Hill in an attempt to cure her of her ailment. After a violent car crash, Sharon disappears and Rose begins her desperate search to get her back. She descends into a fog of smoldering ash and into the center of the twisted reality of a town's terrible secret. Pursued by grotesquely deformed creatures and a townspeople stuck in permanent purgatory, Rose begins to uncover the truth behind the apocalyptic disaster that burned the town 30 years back. Dare to step inside the horrific town of Silent Hill, where darkness preys on every soul and Hell's creations await around every corner. But know that once you enter...there is no turning back.

programme.title: The Stepfather
programme.desc: Jerry Blake (Terry O'Quinn) is a family man, but he happens to have a series of families, with each one on the receiving end of his murderous ways. When Jerry sets his sights on a lovely widow named Susan (Shelley Hack) and her headstrong daughter, Stephanie (Jill Schoelen), it appears that his brutal pattern of killings will continue. However, Stephanie begins to suspect that there's something wrong with the seemingly well-adjusted Jerry, and a violent confrontation is inevitable.

programme.title: Sorority House Massacre

programme.title: Black Christmas

Initially, Barb eggs the caller on, but stops when he responds threateningly. Soon, Barb's friend Claire (Lynne Griffin) goes missing from the sorority house, and a local adolescent girl is murdered, leading the girls to suspect a serial killer is on the loose. But no one realizes just how near the culprit is.

programme.desc: While word of the high-ranking capo Polpo's alleged suicide sparks astonishment and speculation in the crime syndicate Passione, Giorno is inducted into Bucciarati's eclectic mafia family. The only problem now is the vast fortune seemingly up for grabs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Sailing to the Isle of Capri to recover Polpo's estate, Bucciarati and team are ambushed by a stealthy enemy Stand that deflates them into rubber-like human pelts. Abbacchio, however, thinks he can find his comrades and reluctantly activates his Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having beheaded their captor by zipper, the team learns its plan has been leaked to Zucchero's cohort, who is lying in wait on Capri. With fish and gun, Giorno and Mista swim to the island to beat the boat and weed out their assassin-in-waiting.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: As Mista closes in on Sale, all signs seem to point to an easy kill. If only it weren't for the truck hurtling up a mountainous Capri road stuck to his hand or Sale's power to freeze all objects, gunman Mista would be celebrating over his enemy's corpse.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.sub-title: The First Mission from the Boss
programme.desc: Within arm's reach of Polpo's fortune, Bucciarati and team meet the unassuming Pericolo, a capo who has come to accept the treasure. In presenting the loot, Bucciarati is bestowed not only the rank of capo but also an immense duty: protect Trish Una.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: After an encounter with the Hitman Team's Formaggio, Narancia is left wondering why the world is quickly transforming around him. Narancia hunts down his assailant with a hail of bullets as Formaggio tries to understand his attacker's tracking skills.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio's body-shrinking attack. Even beneath a spider's fangs inside Formaggio's bottle, Narancia reveals not Trish's whereabouts but the bullet holes his Stand has left behind.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.sub-title: The Second Mission from the Boss
programme.desc: Giorno, Abbacchio and Fugo travel to Pompeii to find a hidden key pivotal in their protection of Trish. Facing the trio, however, is more than the lonely remains of ancient Roman villas and colonnades. Fugo spots an odd figure in an even stranger mirror.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Illuso has pulled Fugo into his mirror world as Abbacchio rushes to retrieve the key, despite Giorno's stern advice. But Abbacchio cannot escape a similar fate, leaving him and later Giorno to resort to self-mutilation in favor of death by laceration.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. programme.sub-title: Hat Trick // Dancing on the Ice
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend // Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev and Avery find a stray kitten, they put posters around to alert its owner. The owner arrives at the Gear Up Garage...just as the kitty vanishes! Rev and the gang set out to find the kitten, and Operation Kitten Care becomes Operation Rescue! // When Rev leads the gang in a fossil hunting expedition, they find an enormous skull! But when Molly breaks the news that they'll have to leave the skeleton for professionals to dig up, Rev wonders how he can still have a dinosaur of his own.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: Join Rosie and her friends as they go on fun adventures, play games and solve problems. Each episode contains an educational message so that kids are engaged while learning. With a focus on friendship the show also promotes positivity through teamwork.

programme.title: Dibo The Gift Dragon
programme.desc: Let's Party in Cozy Island!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Sing and Dance
programme.desc: Sing, dance & learn with fun songs about health, nature, and classic rhymes!

programme.title: Mya Go

programme.desc: Wow, I Never Knew That! is a whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed.

programme.title: Back to Back

programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. Franklin and his friends learn about life in their village of Woodland, frequently with the help of a parent or other adult.

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

Meanwhile, Betty and her friends go to a fair.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Betty - Takes One to Know One: Betty has been invited to Noah's place, where he is about to demonstrate to her a satellite radio (that inadvertently eavesdrops on Admiral DeGill's personal activities). Leaving, she sees Paloma being chased by Duncan as a result of a prank. Before Duncan can catch either of them, a spaceship appears out of nowhere and abducts Paloma, to Betty's horror. Beaming aboard her ship, she discovers that Sparky and X-5 are being held hostage by Paloma's younger sister, Juanita. Demanding an explanation, Juanita explains that she is, in fact, a Galactic Guardian who is responsible for Paloma's safety. Betty and her crew is forced to accept help from Juanita to save Paloma.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Raiders of the Lost Jewel / In Gronk We Trust: Professor Woodraven enlists the help of the Paq to find the famed Jewel of Kaheelee hidden somewhere in the wilds outside of Orlanta. Himari, Fleming, and Klaus jump at the chance, but not all is as it seems. When the Professor turns out to be an impostor, the Paw must race to save the precious jewel from the thief. / Shaq hosts a charity basketball game and tasks each member of the Paq with picking up items and helping set up for the event. Gronk begs Shaq to let him pick up the most important item, the winning trophy, and Shaq agrees. The rest of the Paq thinks it's a bad idea, but Gronk aims to prove them wrong. After getting distracted multiple times, Gronk has to dig deep to prove that Shaq's trust in his wasn't a mistake.
