programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun the Sheep - Big Top Timmy: A circus sets up in a nearby field, and a spellbound Timmy wanders off to investigate. Can Shaun rescue him before the Farmer notices he's gone?

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun the Sheep - The Kite: The flock think they're in for fun when a kite blows into their field. But it gets stuck in a tree, so it's up to Shaun to find a way to get it down.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Ruby and Bonnie Christmas Switch Up Box of gift Challenge
programme.desc: Ruby and Bonnie switch up their Christmas gift boxes and unwrap surprises! The challenge gets festive and fun as they compete to see who gets the best gift. Watch their hilarious reactions and Christmas cheer unfold.

programme.title: Bug Catching At Home Pretend Play
programme.desc: Kids explore cool insects on TV—until they magically come to life! Now they must rescue Dad and catch all the escaped bugs, from tiny ants to big noisy beetles.

programme.title: Enchantimals: Secrets of Snowy Valley
programme.desc: Welcome to Enchantimals Snowy Valley!

programme.title: The Cutest Christmas Ever!
programme.desc: Santa and his elves bring together the cutest bunch of helpers this side of the North Pole. Can these pups help to raise holiday cheer?

programme.title: Cocoa With Joe Snow Play
programme.desc: Watch two episodes of the Cocoa with Joe Talk Show, featuring Scout Elf Joe and The Elf on the Shelf friends. Learn how to play The Elf on the Shelf Snowball Fight on Roblox and how to dance the Snowflake Shuffle just like a Scout Elf!

programme.title: Baby Shark's Christmas

programme.title: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister, Chelsea, takes us on a fantastical journey to the land of her dreams. Together with their friends, Chelsea and Barbie embark on amazing adventures as they explore exciting new lands, and important life lessons.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.desc: Aurelio se enfrenta a balazos con Rivero y las tropas de la Marina, y aprovecha el tiroteo para matar a Espanto. Feyo convence al Chema, y con sus hombres llegan para apoyar a Casillas.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: En medio del tiroteo, el Chema le salva la vida a Aurelio, pero le recuerda que tiene en sus manos a su hija y a su nieto. Rivero está al borde de la muerte, mientras don Feyo resulta herido.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Chema pacta con Aurelio para levantar el negocio y derrotar a sus enemigos, pero pone como condición que Rutila y su hijo vivan con él. Rivero se salva y acusa a Tim de tenderle una trampa.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio se burla de Tim, y le aclara que ahora no recibe órdenes. Acabará con Meléndez porque ahora es el jefe. Garnica amenaza a Ignacio con los Emes si no lo ayuda a limpiar su expediente.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio le asegura a Javi que no es un soplón. Tim le pide a Julia que convenza a Meléndez de que no vuelva a México, sin sospechar que Casillas y Víctor van a Washington para eliminarlo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica cae de nuevo en los brazos de Aurelio, quien le confiesa que planeó el ataque al rancho para salir de Irma, pero también murió Chabela. Marcado y Garnica le tienden una trampa al Chema.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Chema escapa del ataque de Marcado. Rutila no se salva y paga las consecuencias. A Marcado no le importa nada, y mata a su propia familia frente a los ojos de la hija de Casillas.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Claudia discrimina a los homosexuales y por ello despidió a Sofía. También, Raúl es baterista y Yolanda no tolera el ruido porque tiene hipersensibilidad a algunos sonidos.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Luis le hizo una regresión a Ángela por su fobia a la desnudez, ahora no puede evitar desnudarse. Katiuska y Mario se casaron porque una empresa regala 10 000 dólares a quienes lo hacen.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Alicia le es infiel a su esposo con un amigo y empleado de él, ella dice que el chico insiste. En otro caso, en el colegio de Alicia hay un rumor de que violaron a una joven.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Ladrones de videos de bebés Subastaste mi virginidad por amor
programme.desc: Elisa contrató a Alessandra para poner cámaras de vigilancia en su casa y las hackearon. Por otro lado, Maryan y Kelly acordaron subastar su virginidad y así repartirse el dinero.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: La frase de la discordia Roja realidad
programme.desc: La hija de Irma se suicidó porque un video pornográfico suyo se hizo viral. Por otro lado, Oscar fue secuestrado y sufrió incontables violaciones, ahora se corta para olvidar el dolor.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: El que la hace, la paga El destete
programme.desc: Amanda quiere adoptar a una bebé, sin saber que es la hija de su esposo con otra mujer. La madre de Arlet inicia un negocio de amamantar hombres, luego de ayudar a su yerno con un trauma.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Leomil tiene tres hijas con Oneida, pero una de ellas es abusadora con las demás. En otro caso, Edgar es el encargado de gestionar el dinero que dejó la madre de José y Amanda, y ya queda muy poco.

programme.title: Caso cerrado

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Natasha se encuentra con una presuntuosa y molesta excompañera de la escuela. Vítor y Albertano deciden hacer pasar a Natasha por una exitosa millonaria que vive rodeada de lujos y servidumbre para poner a la presumida en su lugar.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quedan sin gas por no pagar su cuota. Luis es el único que paga su parte, e instala su propio tanque, al que Magda le cierra la llave cuando se baña. Lorena extraña a Benito.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Luis, Arturo y Germán se enfrentan a los cuidadores de carros, pero no logran que se vayan. Los vecinos hacen una junta.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura como orgánica e inorgánica y Germán es el encargado de dicha misión. Alejandra descubre que un niño de la escuela molesta a Morris.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: La familia P. Luche festeja el Día de las Madres de una manera muy particular. Ludovico intenta componer el baño pero un plomero muy guapo lo ayudará.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica tiene un plan para hacer que Ludovico la lleve a comer a un nuevo restaurante. La familia Peluche conoce a Eduardo Santamarina. Todo sale muy mal en la cena.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico le enseña a manejar a Bibi. Federica quiere deshacerse de Maradonio. Bibi choca el carro de Ludovico y la meten en la carcel.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: En el velorio de Merengueti, Ludovico se da cuenta de que el muerto tiene el reloj que perdió en la mañana e intenta quitárselo.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica se encuentra con Arsenio, un antiguo novio millonario. Federica de pronto empieza a tener mucho dinero. Ludovico está destrozado por el engaño de Federica.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le dice a Franco que el papá de Roberta se la quiere llevar a España y el abogado no le garantiza que se la devuelva Marcelino le dice a Roberta que su mamá sufre porque su papá se la llevará Mia le reclama a Julieta por romper su canción.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le dice a Roberta que la ama pero no pudo evitar que su papá se la llevara Pilar sorprende a Vico y Joaquín besándose Mia quiere que su papá salga con Alicia José es humillada por el prefecto Diego se enfurece al ver a Roberta con Facundo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta decide quedarse en la banda de Facundo. Franco y su novia terminan. Diego le pide a Roberta que siga haciéndose pasar como su novia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Madariaga le reclama a Lulú haber renunciado sin avisarle Mia le pide a su papá que intervenga para que no expulsen a Miguel el prefecto recibe cartas amorosas y cree que Mia se las envía Mia le pide a Vico que Joaquín le dé su lugar y la respete.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lulú se disculpa con sus alumnas por no ser honesta con ellas Celina le pide a Mia que asista al ensayo de la banda en su lugar Vico quiere que Joaquín deje a Pilar Diego le dice a Facundo que adora a Roberta y le pide que la saque de su banda.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Giovanni le ofrece su apoyo a Mia Valeria le dice a Franco que lo ama, pero tiene miedo de que Mia los separe Miguel termina con Julieta por temor a que la logia le haga daño Facundo rechaza a Roberta y le explica que no quiere traicionar a Diego.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco le dice a Mia que se reconcilió con Vanesa Joaquín termina con Pilar porque no acepta tener relaciones con él Vico cree que Mia la delató con Esteban sobre sus cartas de amor y la agrede Diego chantajea a Roberta para que regrese con él.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ramiro le reclama a Facundo por decirle a Ana Leticia que Santiago estaba en el hospital, pero él le dice que es su esposa. Ana Leticia le exige a Ana Lucía alejarse de Santiago y le prohíbe ir al hospital. Iñaki revela que tiene mucho dinero.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Inés le reclama a Vasco por buscar de nuevo a Úrsula. Camila y Jimena son escoltadas por los hombres de Ricardo para salir del pueblo. Sofía habla de nuevo con Santiago.

programme.title: Pasión

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El verdadero hermano, el que te presta una mano
programme.desc: Ángel sufre "bullying" por parte de Jorge, pero este no puede defenderse por ser practicante de artes marciales pronto descubre que la actitud de su compañero es porque esconde algo de su familia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A la pereza persigue a la pobreza
programme.desc: Al morir su padre, una joven recibe un fideicomiso, por lo que su madre y su nuevo novio se van a vivir con ella. Cuando la joven enferma, su madre se da cuenta de que su novio es un oportunista de quien debe alejarse.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De lengua me como un taco
programme.desc: Kevin quiere ser rico. A escondidas, roba dinero del negocio de su padre para satisfacer a sus nuevos amigos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que por su gusto se enreda, que se salga como pueda
programme.desc: Cecilia y Roger tienen algún tiempo que se gustan, pero no se atreven a confesarlo. En una fiesta donde ingieren alcohol, ella se queda a dormir con su amiga Tania y Roger le roba un beso, pero Tania lo acusa de abusador.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: No hay quien al caído levante
programme.desc: Alicia está muy enamorada de Ángel, quien resulta ser un delincuente su amiga Julia le advierte sobre el extraño comportamiento de Ángel, y más tarde, descubre que él está implicado en el secuestro de la pequeña Letty.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Gladis publica artículos en su blog sobre cómo diariamente se cometen pecados capitales. Ella y dos de sus compañeras sufren un accidente, y entienden que cada pecado conlleva una consecuencia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cuando el gato no está, los ratones hacen fiesta
programme.desc: Un par de hermanos se quedan solos en su casa debido a una emergencia familiar. Durante una reunión, uno de ellos es convencido por uno de los asistentes para rentar su casa y organizar una fiesta, la cual tiene como fin vender droga.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: María José, Julión Álvarez y Paty Cantú

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Gloria Trevi, regresa con un popurrí con los pequeños. Además en el Sketch la participación especial de Carlos Loret de Mola. Ana Brenda y Cynthia Urías se enfrentan en el karaoke. Los participantes celebran el cumpleaños de Galilea.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Cordero y Venado se convirtieron en mejores amigos cuando iban a Estados Unidos como ilegales. Un coyote los vendió a una banda de traficantes de humanos y la familia de Venado pagó por su rescate.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El líder del cártel de Sinaloa se fuga por segunda vez de una prisión federal en México. Sigue la búsqueda de Joaquín Guzmán Loera, en esta historia se tiene acceso total al lugar de donde se fugó "El Chapo" después de un año y cuatro meses.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El escándalo de la fuga de Joaquín Guzmán, quien escapó de una celda de 3x2 metros y que logró burlar los sistemas de seguridad de la prisión del Altiplano.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Los peligros que existen en los alimentos que se consumen día con día, los diferentes problemas de salud que pueden encontrarse con una mala alimentación. Según los expertos, existen varias alternativas para llevar una vida sana.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una vida llena de cirugías plásticas, lujos, excesos y armas mujeres jóvenes y ambiciosas que están dispuestas a todo por tener una buena vida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Personas con capacidades diferentes cuentan sus historias de lo que ha sido viajar a bordo de 'La bestia'. Una esperanza de llegar a La Casa Blanca es lo que tienen 'los mutilados'.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia con una vida normal cambia de la noche a la mañana cuando el pequeño Oliver es diagnosticado con una agresiva enfermedad. Los padres de Oliver son notificados y comienza el calvario de 36 horas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Teresa Rodríguez relata la historia de la recaptura de Joaquín Guzmán Loera 'El Chapo'. Desde el escape de 'El Chapo' junto con 'El Cholo' de la casa en Culiacán hasta la captura de ambos delincuentes en un hotel de paso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hay veces que las familias son separadas por situaciones fortuitas. Alejandro Muñoz es un periodista cuyo propósito en su programa de televisión es reunir a familias separadas por diversos motivos. Él cuenta algunas de sus experiencias.

programme.title: Buster Williams
programme.sub-title: Ode to Miles: Bitches Brew Beyond
programme.desc: For the 40th anniversary of jazz legend Miles Davis' legendary album Bitches Brew, trumpeter Wallace Roney leads a band that revives the master's music. This project is the brainchild of Miles' family (including his son Erin), which is represented by his nephew, drummer Vince Wilburn. This concert at the ancient theater in Vienne, France, is a grand tribute to Miles.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Tony Bennett
programme.desc: Legendary performer Tony Bennett made his debut appearance at London's iTunes Fest at the Roundhouse and this stellar performance features the multi-Grammy award winner performing his biggest hits, among them, "The Best Is Yet To Come," "Fly Me to the Moon," and his signature song "I Left My Heart in San Francisco."

programme.title: Herbie Hancock
programme.desc: Embark on a remarkable journey through the world of jazz piano as we showcase some of the most iconic and influential pianists in history. This collection of extraordinary performances captures the unique essence and brilliance of legendary pianists Art Tatum, Thelonious Monk, Bud Powell, and others. Revel in Oscar Peterson's virtuosity as his trio plays “C-Jam Blues” in Holbaek, Denmark, on May 2, 1964. Let the sublime artistry of Art Tatum captivate you as he interprets Antonín Dvořák's “Humoresque” in 1953. Discover Thelonious Monk's enigmatic genius as his quartet performs his iconic composition “Round About Midnight” in Poland on April 4, 1966. Experience the timeless appeal of the Dave Brubeck Quartet's odd-metered “Take Five", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium, on October 10, 1964. Delight in the lyrical beauty of Bud Powell's solo performance of “Sweet and Lovely” at the Antibes Jazz Festival of July 13, 1960. Witness the fusion of jazz and funk in Herbie Hancock & The Headhunters' exhilarating studio performance of “Sly” in Bremen, Germany, recorded on November 6, 1974. Lastly, enjoy the soulful grooves of Horace Silver's “Song for my Father” performed by his quintet at the Umbria Jazz Festival of July 20, 1976. Tune in and let these legendary jazz pianists transport you on unforgettable musical adventures!

programme.title: Gilberto Gil
programme.desc: Brazilian artist Gilberto Gil returns to Jazz à Vienne in France with a new round of singing that is inspired by his latest album ‘Fé na Festa': a mixture of celebration, tradition and even some rock now and then. Gilberto Gil, worldwide known for as musician and the Brazilian minister of Culture, was one of the pioneers of the cultural movement ‘tropicalismo'. This movement, with a strong character of social protest, combines elements of traditional Brazilian culture with modern art forms. Gilberto Gil's new sound clearly has its roots in Brazilian culture, yet it is always inspired by jazz.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Chucho Valdis
programme.desc: Legendary Cuban pianist Chucho Valdés brought his band ‘Jazz Batá 2' to the Malta Jazz Festival on July 19, 2019. The air was thick with anticipation as Valdés took to the stage, revisiting the small-group concept of his mythical 1972 Cuban album ‘Jazz Batá'. The batá repertoire – the deep classical music of West Africa – permeates Valdés' piano solos throughout the concert. Valdés's band consists of Dreiser Durruthy (Batas and vocals), Yaroldy Abreu (percussions and vocals), Abraham Mansfarroll (percussion), Ramón Vazquez Martirena-Bajo (bass guitar). They delivered a performance that reverberated through the historic island.

programme.title: Jaco Pastorius
programme.desc: The audience at the Montreal Jazz Festival in Canada was in for a treat on July 3, 1982, as a true musical innovator hit the stage: Jaco Pastorius, who transformed the electric bass into a formidable solo instrument. Combining intricate harmonics, fluid melodies, and unparalleled technical skill, Pastorius left a lasting impact on the music world. In this concert, he is accompanied by Peter Erskine (drums), Don Alias (percussion), Othello Molineaux (steel drums), Bob Mintzer (tenor sax and bass clarinet), and Randy Brecker (trumpet and electronics). They perform “Chicken”, “Donna Lee”, “Mr. Phone Bone”, and “Fannie Mae”. Don't miss this extraordinary opportunity to experience Jaco Pastorius's electrifying performance at the Montreal Jazz Festival 1982!

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in Antonín Dvořák's spirited Slavonic Dances, Op. 46 (Nos. 1-8). These 16 folk dances earned Dvořák, who was a relative newcomer when he wrote them, great success. Originally composed for piano four hands, the London Symphony Orchestra plays the orchestral version of these brilliant works. This performance was recorded at LSO St. Luke's on Old Street in London, UK, on September 23, 2020.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Coro Infantil Da Universidade de Lisboa, Orquesta Gulbenkian, Coro Gulbenkian & Michel Corboz
programme.desc: Bach's famous Saint Matthew Passion premiered on Good Friday of 1727 in the St. Thomas Church of Leipzig in Eastern Germany. Since then, it has become essential to the repertoire of Easter compositions. In this 2014 concert from the Grande Auditório Gulbenkian in Lisbon, the Portuguese Gulbenkian Orchestra interprets the work under the baton of Swiss conductor Michel Corboz, accompanied by the wonderful vocalists of the Gulbenkian Choir, and the children's choir Coro Infantil da Universidade de Lisboa. The soloists are Sandrine Piau (soprano), Carlos Mena (counter-tenor), Vincent Lièvre-Picard (evangelist), Christophe Genz (tenor), André Baleiro (Christ) and Peter Harvey (bass).

programme.title: Coro Infantil Da Universidade de Lisboa, Orquesta Gulbenkian, Coro Gulbenkian & Michel Corboz
programme.desc: Bach's famous Saint Matthew Passion premiered on Good Friday of 1727 in the St. Thomas Church of Leipzig in Eastern Germany. Since then, it has become essential to the repertoire of Easter compositions. In this 2014 concert from the Grande Auditório Gulbenkian in Lisbon, the Portuguese Gulbenkian Orchestra interprets the work under the baton of Swiss conductor Michel Corboz, accompanied by the wonderful vocalists of the Gulbenkian Choir, and the children's choir Coro Infantil da Universidade de Lisboa. The soloists are Sandrine Piau (soprano), Carlos Mena (counter-tenor), Vincent Lièvre-Picard (evangelist), Christophe Genz (tenor), André Baleiro (Christ) and Peter Harvey (bass).

programme.title: Wiener Philharmoniker, Zubin Mehta, Andrea Rost & José Carreras
programme.desc: Maestro Zubin Mehta invites you to an evening of polkas, waltzes, and operetta melodies under the Viennese skies. During the Strauss Gala, Mehta and the Wiener Philharmoniker sweep through a selection of popular operetta melodies by Johann Strauss. The world-famous tenor José Carreras and the compelling lyric soprano Andrea Rost interpret such highlights as Wiener Blut, and songs from Der Zigeunerbaron. This concert was recorded at the Heldenplatz in Vienna in 1999.

programme.title: Led Zeppelin
programme.desc: This is a documentary film about the build-up, making, release, and - crucially - music contained on this most revered of albums. With the aid of rare and classic performances, scarce interviews, seldom seen photographs and contributions from those involved in the making of the record - plus the review and critique from a panel of Zeppelin experts - this program finally lifts the lid on what many believe to be Led Zep's very finest offering. With contributions from the album's engineer, Ron Nevison former Yardbird, Chris Dreja Swansong recording artist, Maggie Bell author of The Rough Guide to Led Zeppelin, Nigel Williamson Tight But Loose editor, Dave Lewis Classic Rock Magazine's Malcolm Dome renowned guitar tutor and author, Rikky Rooksby and Robert Plant biographer, Neil Daniels. This is the complete story behind what what Rolling Stone called "their Tommy, Beggar's Banquet and Sgt. Pepper rolled into one".

programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Janis Joplin
programme.desc: Janis Joplin rose to fame in the late 1960s and was known for her powerful, blues-inspired vocals. She died of an accidental drug overdose in 1970. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Janis Joplin.

programme.title: Jefferson Airplane
programme.desc: Jefferson Airplane was a rock band based in San Francisco, California, who pioneered psychedelic rock. Formed in 1965, the group defined the San Francisco Sound and was the first from the Bay Area to achieve international commercial success. They were headliners at the three most famous American rock festivals of the 1960s—Monterey, Woodstock and Altamont—and the first Isle of Wight Festival in England. Their 1967 break-out album Surrealistic Pillow ranks on the short list of most significant recordings of the "Summer of Love". Two songs from that album, "Somebody to Love" and "White Rabbit", are among Rolling Stone's "500 Greatest Songs of All Time." Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Jefferson Airplane.

programme.title: Céline Dion
programme.sub-title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success. Enjoy the biggest hits of the decade's most important artist: "Because You Loved Me", "All By Myself", "My Heart Will Go On", "I Drove All Night" and others!

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.sub-title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood - Live from MSG
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Oahu Morning Waves
programme.desc: Relax on the shores of Oahu, Hawaii just after sunrise, where big blue waves crash in golden sunlight. The scene has been seamlessly looped for a full hour length, perfect for transporting your TV screen or digital device into a window to paradise!Perfect as a backdrop for meditation, yoga, relaxing, reading, or just as an idyllic flowing screensaver!

programme.title: Return to Paradise 1
programme.desc: Escape to one of the world's most idyllic tropical islands for 2 hours of relaxing on the beach with "Return to Paradise,." The sequel to "A Day in Paradise" (2014), the film returns viewers to the hidden exotic Fijian island of Nanuku - a tiny palm-covered sandy atoll surrounded by magical lagoons brimming with sea life. The film lasts for 2 full hours and features a dynamic mix of stunning tropical island beach & palm tree scenes that will gently transport viewers around the island. Each scene lasts several minutes, allowing time to soak up the views & absorb the healing energies which paradise provides! There are also some aerial drone clips to give the viewer perspective from above.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Sunrise Meditation
programme.desc: Ease into the day with the sound of lapping waves and breathtaking beaches from around the world.

programme.title: Tumalog Falls: Philippines (Music)
programme.desc: Start your journey marveling at the cascading turquoise waters of Tumalog Falls, nestled amidst the lush forest and tropical foliage, and stay captivatingly thrilled by Aguinid Falls' multi-tiered rapids and unique rock formations.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Explore the serene majesty of trees through expressive brushstrokes. From ancient, sprawling branches to sun-dappled leaves, this collection captures the quiet strength and timeless tranquility of woodland scenes in every artistic interpretation.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Explore the mesmerizing world of Varvara Alay, an award-winning graphic designer and illustrator. Her bold colors, surreal motifs, and intricate patterns blend fantasy and realism, creating endlessly fascinating, dreamlike realms filled with elaborate characters and majestic designs.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Step into the surreal world of Greg Noblin, where daydreams and impossibilities take shape. His art weaves slightly vague vignettes, inviting viewers to find their own meaning. Blending whimsy and surrealism, his imaginative works turn the ordinary into something extraordinary.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: This vibrant collection by Indian-American artist Ragni Agarwal bursts with bold colors and pop art flair. Celebrating neurodivergence, inclusion, and unconventional beauty, her work honors the weird, the wild, and those who bloom in their own time.

programme.title: ARTspiration
programme.desc: Dive into a world of creativity and empowerment with a vibrant showcase by talented women artists from diverse backgrounds. Each piece is a testament to the unique power of female voices, collectively weaving a dynamic narrative of inspiration.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: A jubilant tribute capturing the essence of merriment and relaxation through a symphony of colors, paired with the musical genres of electro, deep house and lounge. Each piece bursts with bold, expressive designs celebrating the beauty of unwinding.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Experience the essence of NYE through a vibrant collection of art, pulsating with celebratory energy. Melodies are held by saxophones, synth-pads, and keys while mid to high-tempo tunes set the perfect tone to usher in your New Year with cheer.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Step into a world where each artwork transports viewers to a whimsical realm where snowflakes dance & twinkling lights & laughter fills the air. The music in sets a groovy and euphoric holiday tone featuring flutes, bells, strings, and synth pads.
